Applying to 01001110
Input
I 0 = 0
I 1 = 1
I 2 = 0
I 3 = 0
I 4 = 1
I 5 = 1
I 6 = 1
I 7 = 0
Output
0 I 2 = 0
1 I 3 = 0
2 I 4 = 1
3 I 5 = 1
4 I 6 = 1
5 I 7 = 0
6 C 6n = NOT(1) = 0
7 I 0 = 0

\boxed{00111000}
